_meta.format: Anthropic two-prompt harness JSON ledger (Nov 2025 pattern)
_meta.purpose: Atomic feature ledger for the 21-day sprint. Coding agent picks next unblocked unstarted feature, runs end-to-end test before touching the next. JSON not Markdown so Claude is less likely to silently rewrite.
_meta.completion_metric: passes: true on all P0 features by 2026-06-03

features.name: Initialize repo with full SDLC scaffold
features.notes: Initial commit. PRD + ADRs + governance docs + CI/CD + sprint state files all in place.

features.name: GCP project + Terraform foundation (identity_platform, apigee skeleton, cloud_run, vertex_ai, memory_bank, vector_search, bigquery, kms, monitoring)
features.notes: Sprint D2 deliverable. Requires Daniel to file Vertex AI Provisioned Throughput quota request.

features.name: Port agent-dag-pipeline ADK plumbing (lockfile-pinned consume per ADR 0001)
features.notes: Sprint D3. pip install agent-dag-pipeline + subclass GateAgent ABC + import DEMAS provenance + 3-tier flywheel patterns. NEVER modify upstream.

features.name: N1 Brief Parser node (deterministic gate + LLM agent)
N2 Source Resolver node (descriptor + Memory Bank + DESIGN.md lint)
Pydantic v2 frozen data contracts (TenantContext, BriefSpec, SurfaceManifest, CandidateUI, GateOutcome, JudgeVote, ConsensusResult, CoherenceVerdict, TrajectoryRecord)

_pending_population.definition_will_happen: Sprint D1 (May 15) when writing-plans skill produces the day-by-day implementation plan. The plan will decompose every PRD deliverable into atomic features that follow this schema.

schema_for_new_features.tier: P0 (must ship MVP) | P1 (post-launch within Phase 1.5) | P2 (defer)
schema_for_new_features.name: Imperative subject ≤80 chars
schema_for_new_features.depends_on: [<feature-id>, ...] — list of feature IDs that must complete first
schema_for_new_features.passes: boolean — true only when end-to-end test passes
schema_for_new_features.iteration_count: integer — increments on each Generator-Fixer cycle
schema_for_new_features.human_approved: boolean | null — set true when Daniel signs off
schema_for_new_features.notes: string | null — any context for future sessions
